<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Avatar" align="right" id='img1'>

Research associate in the [Organisations, Information and Knowledge (OAK) group](https://oak-sheffield.weebly.com/),<br> part of the Department of Computer Science of the University of Sheffield in the UK.

My interests lie in natural language processing (NLP), NLP for social media,<br> machine learning and data science — particularly, the development of human-like, affective and multimodal dialogue systems that demostrate commonsense reasoning. 

I obtained my PhD degree in computer science from the University of Sheffield<br>under the supervision of [Prof. Fabio Ciravegna](https://staffwww.dcs.shef.ac.uk/people/F.Ciravegna/Fabio_Ciravegna/About.html). I researched the characterisation of<br>rumours and their spreading on social media and rumour detection in the early<br> stages of the diffusion of real-world events.
<br>
<br>
<br>

<div>
 <img src="images/mailto.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;[suji.han.x@gmail.com](suji.han.x@gmail.com)</span>
</div>
<div>
 <img src="images/github.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;[soojihan](http://github.com/soojihan)</span>
</div>
<div>
 <img src="images/linkedin.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;[soojihan](ttps://www.linkedin.com/in/soojihan/)</span>
</div>
